commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Before the law, Adam spoke prophetically in respect to the woman, and the naming of the creatures; Noah preached repentance;

commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: And spared not the ancient world, but saved Noah the eighth person, a preacher of righteousness, bringing in the flood upon the world of the ungodly; Let us turn to every age that has passed, and learn that, from generation to generation, the Lord has granted a place of repentance to all such as would be converted unto Him. Noah preached repentance, and as many as listened to him were saved. every age that has passed, and learn that, from generation to generation, the Lord has granted a place of repentance to all such as would be converted unto Him.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Noah also, uncircumcised-yes, and inobservant of the Sabbath-God freed from the deluge.
